title: AMD’s Helios puts 72 GPUs and 31 terabytes of HBM4 in one rack. It is AMD’s answer to Nvidia’s NVL72.
summary: AMD Helios packs 72 MI455X GPUs, 31TB HBM4, and 2.9 exaflops of inference into one rack. AMD’s Helios is a single rack containing 72 Instinct MI455X GPUs, 31 terabytes of HBM4 memory, and 2.9 exaflops of FP4 inference compute.
